chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1024 of 2023 Const. Petition No.D-1022 of 2023 Const. Petition No.D-1023 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For orders on CMA 4305/23 3.For hearing of CMA 4306/23 4.For hearing of main case. 16-04-2024 Mr. Muhammad Ali Napar, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Faheem Majeed Memon, Advocate for respondent No.1. ***** Learned counsel for petitioners and learned counsel for respondent No.1 have filed a joint statement seeking disposal of these petitions in the light of which. As per this statement, petitioners would deposit outstanding decreetal amount against them in the respondent- Bank in five equal installments and each installment would be paid after every three month. In case of default, the respondent-bank would be entitled to file application for contempt against the petitioners. Accordingly, these petitions along with pending applications are disposed of with consent in the above terms. Office to place a signed copy of this order in captioned connected matters. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
